_comment: SAMPLE per-deployment connector flags for Creator OS. Copy this to creator-os-connectors.local.json (gitignored) and set states for what you have connected. Unlisted connectors fall back to their registry default_flag (platform APIs default not_installed). manual_paste + uploaded_file are always available. A connector can be ACTIVE yet restricted for specific evidence -- use the object form {state, restricted_evidence, reason}. The simple creator-os-config.local.json capability flags also work: set youtube_api: true and the resolver maps it to youtube_data_api: available automatically.
deployment: Option A -- Claude Desktop with MCP (example config)

youtube_data_api.reason: YouTube Data API v3 does not return video tags for non-owner videos; use competitor_snapshot (playwright_render mode) for hidden tag extraction
